findings.service_type: AI Chat Assistant (Microsoft Copilot, formerly Bing Chat)

streaming.description: Uses fetch() API with ReadableStream response body. Module 'use-fetch-conversation-with-history' handles conversation streaming. NOT WebSocket, NOT SSE EventSource.
streaming.content_type: UNDETERMINED - streaming request completed before Network tab capture. Likely text/event-stream or application/json with chunked transfer.
streaming.note: Exact streaming endpoint URL not captured. The streaming fetch completed before Network monitoring began. Module name 'use-fetch-conversation-with-history-Ch9Eo4pp.js' confirms fetch-based approach.

dom_structure.input_type: React controlled component - requires native value setter pattern
dom_structure.input_note: Two TEXTAREA elements found (both role=textbox). Use querySelector for first match.
dom_structure.response_area: Chat bubble rendering with thumbs up/down, share, copy, read aloud, edit buttons

ui_features.sidebar: Collapsible with Home, New Chat, Library, Tasks, Search, Imagine, Lab sections

warning_design_assessment.approach: Fetch response interception or DOM injection after streaming completes
warning_design_assessment.rationale: Uses standard fetch() streaming (not WebSocket), React SPA with predictable DOM structure. The fetch-based streaming can potentially be intercepted at the response level. Chat bubble DOM injection is also viable as response rendering follows standard patterns.
challenges: Exact streaming endpoint not yet captured - need to confirm in Phase 2
React controlled components require special handling for input manipulation
HTTP/2 protocol - standard APF interception applies
Cloudflare CDN for static assets, but API calls go to copilot.microsoft.com directly

notes: Phase 1 frontend inspection of M365 Copilot (copilot.microsoft.com). Successfully identified the service as a React SPA using Vite bundler with fetch-based streaming (confirmed by 'use-fetch-conversation-with-history' module). NOT WebSocket-based. The exact streaming endpoint URL was not captured because the streaming request completed before Network tab monitoring started. API base path is /c/api/. Authentication was not required for basic chat. The service formerly known as Bing Chat now uses copilot.microsoft.com domain. Conversation types include: chat, character, xbox, group, m365. The 'Smart' mode was active during testing.
